content_brief.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a formal demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99.
content_outline: Introduction: The $2,000+ Problem Facing US Renters
Why Do Landlords Withhold Security Deposits?
What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Legally Deduct
State-by-State Deadlines: How Long Is Too Long?

key_points: Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14–30 days and provide an itemized statement of deductions
Normal wear and tear, pre-existing damage, and unproven repair costs are not legally deductible
A formal demand letter citing state statutes is often enough to force compliance before court becomes necessary
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific security deposit demand letters for $19.99 with no signup or subscription
